producer:producer to publish msg to the topics.we can connect to particular topic and send the msg there.in reality messages are published to topic partition
publisher to send the msg to topic partition.publisher to send the msg to different topic partitions.

bootstrap server:we should write producer or publisher compalsary we need to know about kafka server address.that is called bootstrap server.the default 
server 9092 we can take.

topic:producer to send the msg to particular topic.publisher need to want topic name where we need  to want publish the msg

value serializer:whenever we send the to wire that is it should be serialized.it should be ascii converted and it should be simple string it can should be 
send over wired.should not be a object.method to return the value serialize values.

send:send method is used on producer to publish the data

i have install libraries faker and kafka python libraries
thanks regards
